stemHtml: The minimum obstacle clearance (MOC) value to be applied in the primary area of a mountainous area during the en-route phase of an IFR flight is…

options.b: If variation in terrain elevation is less than 5000 ft: 1500 ft, if variation is greater than 5000 ft: 2000 ft.
options.d: If variation in terrain elevation is less than 5000 ft: 2000 ft, if variation is greater than 5000 ft: 1500 ft.
